images.depicts: little red wooden sled, rope tangled loosely, on a snowy slope
candy-stripe red/cream triangular flag planted on the sled
snake coiled at helm of sled gripping rope, flag overhead
chick mid-jump on snow, wings spread wide to the sides
images.issue: wings are spread outward, not clearly brought together in a 'clap' pose; weak match to 'Chick can clap!'

images.depicts: sled sliding fast downhill, snake streaming, snow spray, flag flattened
three candy-stripe flags shown mid-flap in close-up
a creature with a bear/koala-like face (round ears, button eyes, tongue out) riding the sled behind the snake
images.issue: wrong art — the 'sheep' has a bear/koala face, not the established woolly sheep; reroll

images.depicts: plush-toy-style: chick holding the flag on the sled, a properly woolly sheep clapping behind, snake head at right, snow around them
images.issue: style drift to plush-toy render vs photoreal house style; chick appears to be holding the flag rather than clapping

images.depicts: potato character with a DRAWN-ON cartoon face (eyes, eyebrows) and a red ribbon scarf, sitting on the empty sled; chick, sheep, snake reacting
images.issue: potato has a drawn-on cartoon face + scarf, breaking the plain/realistic potato design used in W31-33; style drift

images.depicts: ripe purple plum with a leaf, dew drops
gold wind-up alarm clock with two bells
small garden slug with eye stalks

line_map.line: The flag is on the sled! (hook, x2) Where is the flag?
Clap for the flag! The sled can zip and slip! Slip and slap and clap!
Snake can sit on the sled! Chick can clap and clap! Slip, sled, slip!
Outro: The flag… the sled… A potato?! (POTATO!) On the sled?! (zoom, potato, zoom!)

generate.line: cards/bingo/matching base asset (spec lists it; file entirely absent from folder)
generate.mj_prompt: a small triangular flag on a wooden stick, ultra-realistic photograph, single subject centered, dramatic spotlight on deep forest-green backdrop, soft shadows, cinematic, slightly whimsical --ar 3:2 --style raw

wrong_art.issue: sheep has a bear/koala face instead of the established woolly design
wrong_art.fix: reroll — mj_prompt: a fluffy round white sheep with kind dark eyes piling onto the back of a speeding red sled behind an emerald-green snake, wool streaming, delighted and terrified, ultra-realistic photograph, dramatic spotlight on deep forest-green backdrop, soft shadows, cinematic, slightly whimsical --ar 3:2 --style raw

wrong_art.issue: drawn-on cartoon face + ribbon scarf breaks the plain-potato series canon
wrong_art.fix: reroll — mj_prompt: an empty red sled with a single plain potato (no face) perched where a rider should sit, wearing a small flag like a cape, about to slide off, a yellow chick white sheep and green snake gaping, dramatic spotlight on the potato, ultra-realistic photograph, deep forest-green backdrop, soft shadows, cinematic, slightly whimsical --ar 3:2 --style raw

wrong_art.issue: plush-toy render style drift vs photoreal house style
wrong_art.fix: reroll to photoreal — mj_prompt: a red sled skidded to a stop at the bottom of a slope in a fan of snow with a tiny yellow chick, a white woolly sheep and an emerald-green snake all clapping and cheering, a flag flying, ultra-realistic photograph, dramatic spotlight on deep forest-green backdrop, soft shadows, cinematic, slightly whimsical --ar 3:2 --style raw

wrong_art.issue: wings spread outward, not brought together — reads as jumping, not clapping
wrong_art.fix: reroll — mj_prompt: a tiny fluffy yellow chick clapping her two wings TOGETHER in front of her body in excitement at the top of a snowy slope, snow puffs at her feet, ultra-realistic photograph, dramatic spotlight on deep forest-green backdrop, soft shadows, cinematic, slightly whimsical --ar 3:2 --style raw
